entries.source: Check each step, correct errors, and connect procedures to concepts.

entries.source: Check the reasoning line by line
Check this step in my working. If it is wrong, explain the mistake and give me one next move.
entries.value: Provjeri ovaj korak u mom radu. Ako je pogrešan, objasni pogrešku i daj mi jedan sljedeći potez.

entries.source: Checking understanding, getting unstuck, and building confidence through active practice.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: Provjeravam može li učenik objasniti ideju.

entries.source: Checks that keep the learning honest

Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: Djeca mlađa od 13 godina potaknuta su da koriste aplikaciju, ali pod nadzorom odraslih. Međutim, mi ne prikupljamo i ne obrađujemo nikakve osobne informacije od djece mlađe od 13 godina te posebno zabranjujemo svakom korisniku mlađe od 13 godina da nam bez roditeljske pristanke pruža osobne podatke. Ako ste roditelj djeteta mlađeg od 13 godina i vjerujete da nam je vaše dijete pružilo osobne informacije, poduzeti ćemo potrebne mjere i obavijestiti vas ako je potrebno. Nema fiksne vremenske linije za neophodnu akciju jer ovisi o količini upita koje vodimo i našoj raspoloživoj radnoj snazi.

entries.source: Coach the learner without shaming them. Ask for context when needed. Be clear about uncertainty. Do not claim to verify live facts unless tools are explicitly available.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. entries.source: Convert the user goal into a rough shared artifact before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes." Ask at most one practical context question if needed, but still create the starter structure.
entries.value: Pretvoriti korisnički cilj u grubi zajednički artefakt prije davanja savjeta. Počnite s: "Napravio sam prvu grubu strukturu. Uredite bilo što. Ja ću reagirati na vaše promjene." Postavite u većini jedne praktične kontekst pitanje ako je potrebno, ali ipak stvorite početnu strukturu.
